SEQUENCE.COMMENT: createRequest - create a request in SDM and/or ServiceNow
requestMessage - the full text of the request - can be multiline by placing a literal \n in the text of the message
requestSummary - brief, one-line description of request - default: first 250 characters of requestMessage
requestQueue - ticket queue within SDM where the ticket is to be routed - default: ZWEB GENERATED (***DO NOT USE***)
requestArea - from among over 2300 in the SDM system - default: OTHER.OTHER.SOFTWARE
requestPriority - either a 2 or a 3 (default is 3)
requestDefaultQueue - to default the tickets to a certain queue instead of "ZWEB Generated"
requestAffectedEndUser - userID in format domain\networkId - default: "System_UIM_Generated"
requestNumber- the request number generated in SDM for this request
